name: io.github.NtrpyDev/proton-workflow-connector
description: Unofficial self-hosted MCP connector for Proton Mail Bridge and SimpleLogin.

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Bridge IMAP/SMTP username (from the Bridge app)

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Bridge-generated password (never your Proton account password)

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Primary Proton address served by Bridge

environmentVariables.name: SIMPLELOGIN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SimpleLogin API key; omit to disable alias tools
